title: NUM'S
description: performance Modpack for SMP and PVP but it ads NO UNNECESSARY MOD'S
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bdfdfc0f3e24f38f52c1c352de2891d572962d1.png)

## A Modpack that ads a handful of mods to improve your minecraft experience but it ads No Unnecessary Mods.
- the Modpack aims to provided you with te most needed mods in an optimized way
- its designed for SMP and PVP but keeps it quite Vanilla
- some futures are: connected glass, armor hud, essantial mod, voicechat, mini and worldmap, etc.
- you can take a look in the Gallery to see how the pack looks like Ingame ↑


**SETTINGS**\
All the settings are tweaked to my personel settings but you can change them if you want.

**Credits**\
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

**And credits to all the amazing creators and Moderators who made it possible to make this project!**
